zh.lifeSummary: 當William Erghum於大約1315年出生在英國越可爾卡索普時，他的父親Richard Argum32歲，母親Mrs. Richard Argum27歲。他於1340年之前與Sibyl FitzHenry在英國結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1403年在英國英格蘭越可爾艾加姆享年89歲。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Erghum was born about 1315, in Carthorpe, Yorkshire, England, his father, Richard Argum, was 32 and his mother, Mrs. Richard Argum, was 27. He married Sibyl FitzHenry before 1340, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1403, in Ergham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Erghum est né environ 1315, à Carthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard Argum, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Richard Argum, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Sibyl FitzHenry avant 1340, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1403, à Ergham, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William Erghumが約1315年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカーソルペで生まれた時，父Richard Argumは32歳，母Mrs. Richard Argumは27歳であった。1340年以前にイギリスでSibyl FitzHenryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1403年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエルガムで89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Erghum(이)가 대략 1315년 영국 요르크실르 카소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Argum(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Richard Argum(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1340년 이전 영국에서 Sibyl FitzHenry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1403년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 르그함에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Erghum родился около 1315 г. в местности картаурп, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Argum было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Richard Argum, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibyl FitzHenry перед 1340 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1403 г. в местности эргам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет.
